source_policy.preferred_source: Official investor-relations annual earnings release or SEC filing
source_policy.precedence: Use the newest official release that presents a prior period comparatively when it explicitly recasts or redefines that period. Preserve the original release and record the restatement.
source_policy.normalization_rule: Store reported and normalized metric definitions separately. Never rank metrics with incompatible denominators.
source_policy.currency: USD millions unless the source states otherwise
source_policy.inventory_scope: Metric families describe what the official sources disclose. extracted_metric_families describes the narrower set currently loaded into peer JSON files.

Uber.benchmark_role: Multi-vertical platform peer for Mobility and Delivery
available_source_metric_families: Adjusted EBITDA and free cash flow
Mobility and Delivery Segment Adjusted EBITDA

FY2023.title: Uber Announces Results for Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2023

FY2024.title: Uber Announces Results for Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2024

FY2025.title: Uber Announces Results for Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2025

caveats: Uber reports constant-currency growth alongside reported growth; store both explicitly.
Business-model changes classified some sales and marketing costs as contra-revenue in 2023, affecting revenue-margin comparability.
GAAP net income includes material equity-investment revaluations and tax valuation allowance effects; do not use it alone to rank operating performance.
Corporate G&A and Platform R&D allocations can change and should remain separate from segment EBITDA.

available_source_metric_families: Adjusted EBITDA and Adjusted EBITDA as a percentage of Gross Bookings
operating cash flow and free cash flow
rides and active or annual riders

FY2023.title: Correcting and Replacing Lyft Announces Fourth Quarter and Full-Year 2023 Results

FY2024.title: Lyft Reports Record Q4 and Full-Year 2024 Results

FY2025.title: Lyft Reports Record Q4 and Full-Year 2025 Results

caveats: Use the corrected FY2023 release; the original release misstated 2024 Adjusted EBITDA margin guidance expansion as 500 basis points instead of 50 basis points.
Lyft simplified its Gross Bookings definition in Q4 2025 and stated that prior periods were unaffected; retain the definition-change note.
FY2025 net income includes a material tax valuation allowance release and is not a clean operating-profitability comparison.
FY2025 revenue includes a material legal, tax, and regulatory reserve impact; store reported and adjusted context.

available_source_metric_families: Adjusted EBITDA and Adjusted EBITDA as a percentage of Marketplace GOV
operating cash flow and free cash flow

FY2023.title: DoorDash Releases Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2023 Financial Results

FY2024.title: DoorDash Releases Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2024 Financial Results

FY2025.title: DoorDash Releases Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2025 Financial Results

caveats: Marketplace GOV is directionally comparable to Grab Deliveries GMV but requires an explicit definition bridge.
FY2023 growth includes Wolt; distinguish reported growth from pro-forma growth where provided.
FY2025 includes the Deliveroo acquisition from October 2025; store organic and acquisition-affected growth separately where disclosed.
DoorDash group metrics include restaurant, grocery, retail, and international local-commerce activities.

Sea.benchmark_role: Southeast Asian ecosystem, e-commerce monetization, and digital-finance benchmark
available_source_metric_families: group revenue, net income, and Adjusted EBITDA
Shopee GMV, orders, revenue, and Adjusted EBITDA
Monee or Digital Financial Services revenue and Adjusted EBITDA
loan principal outstanding and NPL ratio

FY2023.title: Sea Limited Reports Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2023 Results

FY2024.title: Sea Limited Reports Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2024 Results

FY2025.title: Sea Limited Reports Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2025 Results

caveats: Shopee GMV is e-commerce marketplace volume and is not directly comparable with food-delivery GMV.
Digital Financial Services is branded Monee in FY2025 materials; preserve a stable canonical segment identifier across years.
Some GAAP reporting combines e-commerce and other services; use business-highlight metrics for Shopee and Monee only with clear non-GAAP labels.
Credit comparisons require loan-book scope, on-book versus off-book treatment, NPL definition, and credit-loss denominator.
